E:\software\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sandbox.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sandbox.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sandbox.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sandbox.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o F:\yxy\GameEngine\sandbox\sandbox.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsandbox.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sandbox.dir\linkLibs.rsp
